question: List the station name and the type of water body for stations that recorded data in the year 2023 but had no records in the year 2021, ensuring that there is at least one entry for the maximum fecal streptococci MPN per 100ml, and order the results alphabetically by station name.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATION_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY FROM DIM_STATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_STREPTOCOCCI AS T2 ON T1.STATION_ID = T2.STATION_ID WHERE T2.YEAR = 2023 AND T1.STATION_ID NOT IN (SELECT STATION_ID FROM FACT_STREPTOCOCCI WHERE YEAR = 2021) GROUP BY T1.STATION_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY HAVING COUNT(T2.MAX_FECAL_STREPTOCOCCI_MPN_PER_100ML) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATION_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT s.STATION_NAME, s.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY
FROM DIM_STATION s
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM FACT_STREPTOCOCCI f
    WHERE f.STATION_ID = s.STATION_ID
    AND f.YEAR = 2023
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM (
        SELECT STATION_ID
        FROM FACT_THERMAL
        WHERE YEAR = 2021
        UNION ALL
        SELECT STATION_ID
        FROM FACT_OXYGEN_DEMAND

        UNION ALL
        SELECT STATION_ID

        UNION ALL

        WHERE YEAR = 2021
        UNION ALL
        SELECT STATION_ID

        WHERE YEAR = 2021
        UNION ALL
        SELECT STATION_ID
        FROM FACT_STREPTOCOCCI
        WHERE YEAR = 2021
    ) AS all_data_2021
    WHERE all_data_2021.STATION_ID = s.STATION_ID
)
ORDER BY s.STATION_NAME;
